generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that countries with mandatory conscription actually have *lower* military readiness? The constant turnover of untrained draftees creates instability. Professional volunteers maintain consistent skill levels. Our allies in Europe are struggling with this exact problem. Shouldn't we learn from their experience? #NationalSecurity #MilitaryReadiness
